title: Crisp Quick Fix Mediterranean Apple Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crisp mediterranean dish featuring apple cider vinegar, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup red onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Use white or yellow onion for different textures.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin olive oil is recommended for flavor and health benefits.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup red wine vinegar (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a tangier dressing, reduce to 1 tablespoon.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add red onion, garlic, and apple slices. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until onions are translucent and apples have softened slightly.
Pour vinegar into the pan, reduce to simmer and cook for another minute.
Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot or at room temperature as a side dish or main course.
